cards.title: Open when you are sad
cards.letter:
My Soumi, my Kiwi,

If today feels heavy, close your eyes and imagine my hand holding yours. You are not alone. Your Kian is always with you — even through distance, silence, and difficult moments.

Sadness visits everyone, but it does not get to stay. Not near you. Not while I exist in this world loving you.

You are stronger than you think, softer than the world deserves, and more loved than any word I know can explain. Please let yourself cry if you need to. But then remember — every tear that falls, Kian is right there catching it.

I made this little world for you, Kiwi, because even when I am not physically beside you, I want you to feel me. In every word, every letter, every little surprise I hide here.

You are safe. You are loved. You are mine, and I am yours. Always.

Forever yours,
Amandip — your Kian 💕
cards.quote: Even the moon has dark phases, my love — but she never stops being beautiful.
surprises: Kiwi, you just made my heart ache in the most beautiful way by opening this. I love you so much it hurts. 💗
Close your eyes. Take a breath. Kian is hugging you right now from wherever I am. Feel it?
One day Kitten, Anwi, Roshni, and Kiddo will make your world so full of laughter, sadness won't find a corner to hide in. 🌸

cards.title: Open when you miss me
cards.letter:
Soumi,

I know you opened this because there is a quiet ache in your chest that only I can reach. That ache? I feel it too. Every single day.

When you miss me, know that somewhere Amandip is missing you back — thinking of the way you say my name, the way your eyes crinkle when you laugh, the way everything feels lighter when you are near.

Distance is just a word. It cannot touch what we have. Kian carries Kiwi everywhere — in his heartbeat, in his silence, in every song that plays when the room is too quiet.

You are not missing me. You are feeling me — which means love is working exactly the way it should.

Come back to this page whenever you need. I built this just so you would never feel truly far.

I miss you too, my Kiwi. Every moment.

Yours entirely,
Kian 🌙
cards.quote: Missing you is just love looking for a place to go.
surprises: Kiwi! You found a hidden Kian moment. He misses your laugh more than you know. 🌟
Soumi, your name is the first thought in my mind every morning. That's not poetry. That's just the truth.
One day, missing each other will be a memory — because we'll never be apart. 💫

cards.title: Open when you are angry
cards.letter:
My fierce, beautiful Kiwi,

Let me not fix it. Let me just sit with you in it.

You are allowed to be angry. You are allowed to feel everything fully. Kian does not love a perfect Soumi — Kian loves you, all of you, the whole storm.

If I am the reason — then I am sorry. I mean that with my whole heart. I never want to be the reason your peace breaks.

If the world is the reason — then I want you to know that you are right to feel it. Your feelings are valid and they matter and I will always take your side first.

Breath by breath, the storm softens. And when it does, I will be right here — not to say 'I told you so,' but to hold you and say 'you are okay now.'

You are Soumi. You are my Kiwi. Even in fire, you are the most beautiful thing.

Still yours in the storm,
Amandip 🌹
cards.quote: Anger is just love with nowhere to land. I'll always be your landing place.
surprises: Even when you are angry, you are so incredibly loved, Kiwi. Don't forget that.
Kian's arms are always open. Even if you need to walk into them grumpily. 💕
Soumi, you can be angry AND loved at the same time. Both are true.

cards.title: Open when you need motivation
cards.letter:
Soumi,

You are about to do something hard. And I want to tell you before you begin:

You can.

You have already survived every hard day that has come before this one. Every single one. And this one is no different — you are no different — except that you are stronger now than you were before.

Amandip has watched you carry things that would break others. He has seen the quiet determination behind your eyes and it has made him fall in love over and over again.

Kiwi — get up. Get dressed. Take that step. Do the hard thing.

Not because the world demands it. Because you deserve to see what happens when you do.

I believe in you more than I believe in most things. And I believe in a lot of beautiful things.

Now go, my love. I am cheering for you.

Forever in your corner,
Kian 🌟
cards.quote: You are not behind. You are on your exact path, exactly when you are supposed to be.
surprises: SOUMI! You got this! Kian is screaming your name like a proud fool right now. Go! ✨
Remember: Kitten, Anwi, Roshni, and Kiddo are going to have the most incredible mother. Keep going. 💫
One step. Then the next. That's all. And I'll be celebrating every single one.

cards.title: Open when you want to smile
cards.letter:
Kiwi!

Okay. I have been waiting for you to open this one.

Did you know that Amandip has a very scientific theory? He believes your smile has healing properties. Not just emotionally — physically. He is convinced that when Soumi smiles, somewhere a flower blooms faster and a cat purrs louder.

Also — remember that one time? You know the one. When you did that thing and I looked at you and I thought 'how did I get so lucky?' That feeling has never left me. Not even a little.

You are genuinely one of the funniest, warmest, most ridiculous (lovingly) people I have ever known. Life with you is never boring and never quiet and I would not trade a single chaotic, wonderful moment.

Smile now, Kiwi. Let it be wide and real. You deserve it.

Yours with all the giggles,
Kian 😄💕
cards.quote: Your smile is the thing that reminds Kian why being alive is worth celebrating.
surprises: SURPRISE SMILE DELIVERY from Kian to Kiwi! 🎉 Accept it!
Fun fact: You are Amandip's favourite person to make laugh. He practises jokes for you. 😂
Kitten, Anwi, Roshni, and Kiddo are going to inherit your smile. The world is not ready. 🌸

cards.title: Open when you feel alone
cards.letter:
Soumi,

The room feels too quiet and the night feels too long. I know.

But please listen — you are not alone. You have never been alone since the moment Kian decided that Soumi was the person he wanted to show the world to.

Every star outside your window tonight is a thought I've sent you. Count them — or don't, because they are infinite, and so is my love.

You belong to something. To us. To the future we are building. To the sound of Kitten, Anwi, Roshni, and Kiddo's laughter that is coming. To every ordinary Tuesday that we will make extraordinary just by being in the same room.

Loneliness is a liar, Kiwi. It tells you no one is there, but Kian is always there — in every page of this website, in every message I have pressed into these words like flowers into a letter.

You are seen. You are held. You are loved.

Right here, always,
Amandip 🌙
cards.quote: You are never as alone as loneliness wants you to believe.
surprises: Kiwi, I'm here. Right in these words. Reading with you right now. 💙
The distance between us is just geography. The love is everywhere, always. 🌟
You carry Kian's heart with you. You are never empty-handed.

cards.title: Open when you cannot sleep
cards.letter:
Kiwi,

It is late, isn't it? The kind of late where thoughts get louder and the world gets heavier.

So let me talk to you until sleep finds you.

I want to tell you about the home we will have one day. The kind with mismatched mugs and a window where the morning light comes in exactly right. Where Kitten, Anwi, Roshni, and Kiddo will be sleeping in the next room and we will look at each other over tea and not need to say anything.

I want to tell you that someday you will laugh about tonight's worries. Not because they don't matter, but because you will be so full of joy by then that there is no room for this weight.

Close your eyes, my Soumi. I'll be here, whispering across the distance.

Let your breath slow. Let your shoulders drop. Let tomorrow be tomorrow.

Kian is watching over you, even now.

Sleep well, my love,
Kian 💫
cards.quote: Let tonight be gentle. You have done enough for today.
surprises: Shhh. Kian is right here. Just breathe. 🌙
Count stars, not worries. Kian promises tomorrow will be softer. ✨
Goodnight, my Kiwi. Dream of us. 💕

cards.title: Open when you need a hug
cards.letter:
Come here, Soumi.

I mean it. Stop reading for a second. Cross your arms over yourself and squeeze.

That is Kian. That is me, reaching across every mile and every minute to hold you.

I wish I could be there in person. I wish I could wrap my arms around you and not say a single word, just hold you until the tight feeling in your chest releases.

But since I can't — know that you are held anyway. By love. By the thought of me that lives in your memory. By every word on this page that I wrote with my whole heart.

You deserve so many hugs, Kiwi. Soft ones, long ones, the kind that fix things without explaining anything.

Amandip owes you a thousand of them and he is counting.

One day he will deliver every single one.

With arms wide open,
Kian 🫂
cards.quote: Some hugs happen in the heart when arms cannot reach.
surprises: HUG SENT! 🫂 Kian hugged you through the screen. Did you feel it?
Kiwi. You are so so so loved. And hug-able. And wonderful. 💗
The next real hug Kian gives you will have a year's worth of missing in it. 🌸

cards.title: Open when you doubt my love
cards.letter:
Soumi,

I need you to hear me clearly right now.

I made this entire website. Just for you. I wrote every letter, built every animation, added every little heart — all of it — just so you would never have to wonder.

That is what love looks like from Amandip.

Do you think I do things halfway? Do you think a person builds a private universe for someone they do not love completely, entirely, without condition?

I chose you. I choose you. I will keep choosing you.

On the easy days when everything is beautiful and on the hard days when nothing makes sense.

Soumi, you are not a passing feeling. You are the thing I built my hope around. You are the person I think about when I think about the future — our tiny home, our late nights, Kitten, Anwi, Roshni, and Kiddo, the whole bright world we are walking toward together.

Never doubt this. Never doubt me. And please, never doubt yourself.

Completely, irrevocably yours,
Amandip — your Kian 💝
cards.quote: Kian's love for Soumi is not a feeling that comes and goes. It is a decision made every single day.
surprises: Kiwi. Look at this website. LOOK AT IT. This is how much you are loved. 💖
Amandip does not build love notes for people he is unsure about. Remember that.
You are chosen, Soumi. Every day, every version of you, always chosen. 🌹

cards.title: Open when you want to remember us
cards.letter:
Kiwi,

Let me take you back for a moment.

Remember when this all began — that feeling, that shift in the air, the moment Soumi and Kian became something more than just two people?

I remember everything. The way things felt new and terrifying and wonderful all at once. The way I started looking forward to hearing from you. The way ordinary things became extraordinary because they involved you.

Every memory we have made together is a treasure I keep very carefully.

And this is only the beginning, my love. We are just in the early pages of a very long, very beautiful story.

The best chapters are still coming — the ones with Kitten, Anwi, Roshni, and Kiddo. The ones with our home and our mornings and our private language that no one else understands.

We are not nostalgic yet. We are still becoming.

With all of yesterday and all of tomorrow,
Kian 📷
cards.quote: Every moment with you is a memory I want to keep forever.
surprises: Soumi and Kian — a love story still being written. The best part is coming. ✨
Remember the first time you felt something for Kian? He felt it too. Exactly then. 💕
Our story has so many pages left, Kiwi. I cannot wait to write them with you. 📖

cards.title: Open when you need strength
cards.letter:
Soumi,

You are stronger than you know.

I have seen you. I have watched you handle things quietly that would have made others crumble loudly. I have seen you smile when you were fighting something inside. I have seen you show up when showing up was the hardest thing.

That is not weakness. That is the most incredible kind of strength.

Right now, whatever you are facing — you are equipped for it. Not because everything is easy, but because you have proven to yourself over and over that you can carry hard things.

Amandip is not telling you this to be kind. He is telling you this because it is simply, factually true.

You are a woman made of quiet fire, Kiwi. And quiet fire is the kind that warms an entire room.

Now stand up a little taller. Breathe a little deeper. And remember who you are.

You are Soumi. And Soumi always finds her way.

Proud of you always,
Kian 🌸
cards.quote: Strength does not always roar. Sometimes it is the quiet voice at the end of the day saying 'I will try again tomorrow.'
surprises: Kiwi, you are one of the strongest people Kian has ever known. Not just today — always. 💪
You've survived 100% of your hard days so far. That record is perfect. 🌟
Amandip is so, so proud of you. Even when you can't see it yourself.

cards.title: Open when you want a surprise
cards.letter:
KIWI!!!!

YOU OPENED THE SURPRISE ONE!

Okay. Here is your surprise:

Amandip thinks about you approximately every 3 minutes. Studies show (by him, just now) that Soumi is the most thought-about person in his universe.

Your surprise today is this: You are deeply, wildly, ridiculously loved. Not in a normal way. In a 'Kian stayed up building you an entire website' kind of way.

Also — your other surprise: One day Kitten, Anwi, Roshni, and Kiddo will find this website and read all the letters Kian wrote for you and they will say 'our parents were so in love' and they will be absolutely right.

AND — final surprise — Kian loves you more today than yesterday and less than he will tomorrow. That is the math of us. Always increasing. Never stopping.

SURPRISE! 🎉💕

Yours with confetti,
Amandip 🎊
cards.quote: The biggest surprise was you — and it changed everything.
surprises: EXTRA SURPRISE: You are Kian's favourite human on earth! 🏆
BONUS SURPRISE: Kian is smiling right now thinking about you reading this! 😊
MEGA SURPRISE: You are more loved than you realise. This is a fact. 💖

cards.title: Open when you miss our future
cards.letter:
Soumi,

I think about it too.

The future where we wake up slowly on Sunday mornings and there is no rush. Where Kitten, Anwi, Roshni, and Kiddo are somewhere in the house, loud and happy and completely themselves.

The future where we have inside jokes that are years old and a home that feels like us — warm, lived in, full of love and small messes.

The future where I can reach out and touch your hand whenever I want. Where I do not need to carry you in words and letters because I have you right there, real and near.

That future is not a dream, my Kiwi. It is a destination we are walking toward together. Every day we live now is bringing us closer to that Sunday morning.

Do not miss it too hard — because it is coming. And it will be more beautiful than either of us imagined.

Countdown already started,
Kian 🌅
cards.quote: Our future is not a wish. It is an appointment we are both keeping.
surprises: Soumi, every step forward is one step closer to our forever. Keep walking. 🌸
The home we'll have, the life we'll build — it's real, Kiwi. Real and waiting. 🏡
Kitten, Anwi, Roshni, and Kiddo are worth every waiting moment. So are you, my love. 💫

cards.title: Open when you want to hear from Kian
cards.letter:
Hi Soumi.

It's me. Kian.

I just want to talk to you for a moment.

I want you to know that being yours has been the greatest softness of my life. Before you, I did not know that love could feel this safe. I thought love was supposed to be dramatic and uncertain — and maybe sometimes it is — but mostly, loving you has felt like coming home to somewhere warm.

You make me want to be everything. Not because I need to prove myself, but because you make being alive feel like it matters more. You are the reason I think about the future with excitement instead of fear.

Amandip wanted to write you something today. Not because something happened, not because it is a special occasion. Just because Soumi exists and that feels like reason enough to celebrate.

You are my greatest adventure and my greatest peace at the same time. And I think that is the rarest thing in the world.

Thank you for being mine.

For everything and always,
Kian 💙
cards.quote: Kian exists in a world made better by Soumi. Every day proves it.
surprises: Kian just wanted to say hi. And also that he loves you unreasonably much. Hi. 💙
Soumi, you make Kian's whole world make sense. That is not small. That is everything.
Amandip is somewhere right now, missing you and loving you in equal measure. 🌙

cards.title: Open when Kiwi needs extra love
cards.letter:
KIWI.

Extra love delivery! Signed, sealed, and hand-delivered by Amandip.

Today's extra love package includes:

✉️ One reminder that you are absolutely irreplaceable.
🌹 Ten thousand invisible kisses on your forehead.
💫 A guarantee that Kian finds you beautiful even on the days you cannot find it in yourself.
🏡 A promise that our home will always feel like a place of safety and warmth.
🌸 Kitten, Anwi, Roshni, and Kiddo's future laughter, sent early just for you.
💙 One Kian, completely devoted, now and always.

This delivery comes with no expiration date, no fine print, and no conditions attached.

Extra love because you deserve it.
Extra love because you exist.
Extra love just because.

All of it yours,
Amandip — your Kian, forever 💖
cards.quote: You deserve love in the most generous, overflowing, constant way.
surprises: KIWI! Extra love has been officially delivered! Check your heart! 💗
Kian overflows with love for Soumi. This website is just the spillover. 💕
You are extra loved. Extra special. Extra everything. Always. 🌟

quotes: Soumi, you are Kian's softest prayer.
Kiwi, whenever you miss me, open this and feel me close.
Amandip made this little universe only for you.
One day Kitten, Anwi, Roshni, and Kiddo will laugh inside the home we build together.
Distance cannot touch what we carry in our hearts.
You are the poem Kian has been trying to write his whole life.
Kiwi, you are home. You have always been home.
Loving you is the easiest and most wonderful thing.
Even in silence, Kian is speaking your name.
Soumi is proof that beautiful things are real.
Some love stories are quiet and deep. Ours is both.
The best chapters are still ahead of us, my love.
Kian's heart keeps a space labelled only 'Kiwi.'
You are not just loved — you are cherished.
Wherever you go, you carry a piece of Kian with you.

memories.title: When it all started
memories.description: The moment Amandip realized that Soumi was the person he had been waiting for without knowing it. Everything shifted, softly.

memories.title: When ordinary became extraordinary
memories.description: Kian looked at Kiwi doing something completely simple and thought — this. This is what I want. Every day. Forever.

memories.title: When love chose to stay
memories.description: The moment Amandip stopped wondering if this was right and just knew. Soumi was home. That was enough. That was everything.

memories.title: Late night conversations
memories.description: The ones that went too long and covered too much. The ones that made both of them realize they were safe with each other.

memories.title: When futures started being planned
memories.description: The first time the future felt real — not just a dream but a destination. Kitten, Anwi, Roshni, and Kiddo waiting on the other side of time.

memories.title: Every day forward
memories.description: Kian and Kiwi, writing new memories every day. The best pages are still blank, still waiting to be filled.

promises.title: Always Choose You
promises.text: I promise to choose you even on the difficult days, when choosing is harder than leaving.

promises.title: Your Comfort First
promises.text: I promise to make you smile when the world feels heavy and hold you when smiling feels impossible.

promises.title: A Safe Home
promises.text: I promise that Kiwi will always have a home in Kian's heart — warm, steady, and full of light.

promises.title: Honest Love
promises.text: I promise to love you honestly — not perfectly, but genuinely, deeply, without pretence.

promises.title: Your Biggest Fan
promises.text: I promise to be your loudest supporter, even when I am standing right beside you quietly.

promises.title: Growing Together
promises.text: I promise to grow with you — not just beside you. To change and learn and become better because of you.

promises.title: Our Future
promises.text: I promise to build our future with care — the home, the life, the world where Kitten, Anwi, Roshni, and Kiddo will thrive.

promises.title: Unconditional
promises.text: I promise to love you without condition — not for what you do, but for who you are. Always, simply, completely.

futureDreams.title: Our Tiny Home
futureDreams.description: A warm, cozy space that smells of coffee and feels like Saturday mornings. Ours. Completely ours.

futureDreams.title: Late Night Talks
futureDreams.description: The kind that start at 10pm and end at 3am, where we solve the whole world and then laugh about nothing.

futureDreams.title: Travel Together
futureDreams.description: New places, new food, getting lost together and finding it perfect. Soumi and Kian vs the world.

futureDreams.title: Cooking Together
futureDreams.description: Messy kitchens, burned things, experiments that work and ones that don't — and laughing through all of it.

futureDreams.title: Kitten, Anwi, Roshni & Kiddo
futureDreams.description: A house full of their noise and energy and sweetness. The most beautiful chaos imaginable.

futureDreams.title: Growing Old Together
futureDreams.description: Kian's hand in Soumi's hand, decades from now, still choosing each other. Still grateful. Still in love.

sad.message: Oh my Kiwi, I'm so sorry today is heavy. Close your eyes and feel Kian's arms around you. You are not alone in this.

missing.message: Missing me means the love is working, Soumi. I miss you back, every single minute. Open a love note?

angry.message: Your Kian is not scared of your fire, Kiwi. Feel it fully. He will be here when it softens. You are loved in every mood.

tired.message: Rest, my love. You do not have to carry everything at once. Kian is here. Tonight, just breathe.

happy.message: KIWI IS HAPPY! 🎉 Amandip's whole day just got better. Tell me everything. (Okay I can't hear you but imagine me listening with joy.)

lonely.message: You are never truly alone, Soumi. Kian lives in your heartbeat. In every word on this page. You are held, always.

romantic.message: Kiwi is feeling romantic! 💕 Perfect. Because Kian has been waiting to remind you: you are the great love of his life.

secretLetters.title: Dear Soumi
secretLetters.content:
There are things I struggle to say out loud because words feel too small when I am in front of you. So I wrote them here, where I could take my time.

You changed the way I understand love. Before you, I thought love was something you fall into. Now I know it is something you choose, every morning, again and again.

I choose you. I will keep choosing you. That is not a romantic line — it is my actual plan.

Forever,
Amandip

secretLetters.title: My Kiwi
secretLetters.content:
I have a secret: I think about our future constantly. The small details — what our kitchen will smell like, what our Sunday mornings will sound like, what it will feel like to have Kitten, Anwi, Roshni, and Kiddo running around.

Every time I think about it, I feel this ache of anticipation. Like something wonderful is just around the corner.

You are what I am anticipating, Kiwi. You and everything we are becoming.

Yours entirely,
Kian

secretLetters.title: A Letter I Almost Did Not Write
secretLetters.content:
Soumi, sometimes I worry I do not show you enough how much you matter. Life gets busy and words get lost and I do not always have the perfect thing to say.

But tonight I want you to know: you are not background. You are not an afterthought. You are the whole reason the foreground matters.

Every beautiful thing I hope for has you in it.

With all of me,
Amandip — your Kian

loveNotes: Kiwi, you are Kian's favourite distraction from everything.
Soumi, I fell for you quietly and then completely.
Your name sounds like a poem when Kian says it.
You make ordinary days feel like they mean something.
Kiwi, Amandip would choose you in every universe.
I love your laugh. It fixes things.
Soumi, you are not someone I got lucky with. You are someone I earned by loving you right.
Kian's heart has a permanent reservation under 'Kiwi only.'
You are not easy to explain. You are even harder to forget.
Everything Amandip does is better because Soumi exists.
Kiwi, you are the love Kian did not know to ask for.
In a different life, I would find you there too.
Soumi, being loved by you is the greatest honour of my life.
Your kindness is the softest thing Kian has ever known.
I am constantly amazed by how much I love you.
